nodes.name: Cron — Daily 6 AM
nodes.notes: Daily 6 AM — syncs Xero bank balances and financial metrics to canonical_metric.

nodes.name: Fetch Bank Balance
nodes.notes: Fetches bank summary from Xero API. Requires OAuth2 token refresh (handled by n8n credential).

parameters.query: INSERT INTO canonical_metric (metric_name, value, unit, source) VALUES ('cash_balance', $1, 'AUD', 'xero');
INSERT INTO canonical_metric (metric_name, value, unit, source) VALUES ('receivables', $1, 'AUD', 'xero'), ('payables', $2, 'AUD', 'xero');

nodes.name: Cash Threshold Check
nodes.notes: If cash balance drops below $50,000 AUD, fire alert to Fabian. Threshold from TAS-001.3 integration map.

parameters.subject: ALERT: Cash Position Below Threshold
parameters.text:
Cash balance is ${{$json.cash_balance}} AUD, below the $50,000 threshold.

Please review immediately.

— TAS Operating System

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('XeroSyncCompleted', 'metric', 'n8n', jsonb_build_object('cash_balance', $1, 'receivables', $2));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('xero_sync', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Daily 6 AM. Syncs Xero bank balances, receivables, payables to canonical_metric. Fires cash threshold alert if below $50K. From original Phase 1 Build Manual + TAS-001.3 integration map.
